description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can with a cylindrical shape and a slightly domed top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with bold white branding, featuring the word 'Coke' in large, stylized letters on one side and the classic Coca-Cola script logo on the other. The surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light, and the can is topped with a metallic pull-tab opening mechanism. Nutritional and product information is printed in small white text on the back, along with a barcode and volume indication. The can appears undamaged, with no visible dents or scratches, and is typical of soft drink containers found in urban environments.
description: A glossy red aluminum can with bold white Coca-Cola branding and a metallic pull-tab top. The surface is smooth, with detailed product information and logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white 'Coke' text on a red background, with the metallic pull-tab top visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the red can with white wave graphics and minimal text, mostly showing the design pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the Coca-Cola script logo, detailed product information, and a barcode in white text.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the transition between the 'Coke' text and the product information, with the can's curvature evident.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white 'Coke' text on the front, classic Coca-Cola script logo on the back, white product information, and a barcode. All branding is in white on a red background with wave graphics.
